action.reasoning: Observation: Best mean_r2 remains 0.303 (iter11, select-on-val_r2_q, 50 epochs) but ckpt overwritten; current best.pt (15-epoch similar config) scores 0.232 with r2_q=-0.087 (val_r2_q=0.17). Time critically low (~1.9min left), no retrain possible. Grouped clipping [-25,25] t / [-4,4] q+others still yields negative q-r2. Analysis: Test dist-shift causes q-outliers (R2 hypersensitive); val-optimal per-group clipping (grid search on val mean_r2) can better cap extremes while preserving signal (val maxabs: t~23, q/rad/precip~3). Curves plateau early; iter11 wider clip helped cross to positive q-r2. Decision: Write optimize_clip.py to infer once on val, grid-search clip bounds (t:10-30, q/other:1-5), compute per-group R2, select best mean_r2 clips, then auto-rewrite predict.py with those hardcoded values + stats prints. Run it (fast <30s), then submit_eval on best.pt to potentially recover >0.23 mean_r2.
